item.title: Chocolate Brown Velvet LED Ring Jewelry Display Gift Box
item.description: Chocolate brown velvet LED ring jewelry display gift box by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This luxurious chocolate brown velvet jewelry box features an integrated warm-white LED ring light that illuminates the ring when the lid opens, creating a breathtaking reveal moment for engagement rings, wedding bands, and fine jewelry. The velvet exterior, gold foil branding, and precision LED engineering make this the definitive choice for luxury jewelry brands. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Custom Logo Watch Display Box with LED Light and Suede Interior
item.description: Luxury custom logo watch display box with integrated LED light and premium suede interior — engineered to elevate the unboxing moment for discerning watch enthusiasts. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) runs KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, producing 1.7 million boxes daily. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. The magnetic reed switch activates warm LED illumination the moment the lid opens — no buttons, no cables, just an instant premium presentation.

item.title: Double Layer Velvet Necklace & Earring Display Box with LED Lighting
item.description: Double-layer velvet jewelry display box with LED spotlight and magnetic flap closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. The two-tier design separates necklaces and earrings in dedicated compartments with flocked velvet trays that prevent scratching and tangling. An LED spotlight automatically activates when the lid opens, illuminating your pieces with warm white light for maximum visual impact at retail counters and gift presentations.

item.title: Earring Gift Box with Satin Lining Gold Foil Hot Stamping
item.description:
Description

Our earring gift box with satin lining and gold foil hot stamping elevates jewelry presentation for retail, e-commerce, and gifting occasions. Each box is produced in our 18,000 sqm Foshan manufacturing facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory), where 23 years of packaging expertise meet state-of-the-art offset and finishing technology. The rigid construction provides crush resistance, while the soft satin interior cradles delicate earrings and prevents surface scratches.

Printing runs on KBA 1050 4-color offset presses for precise color reproduction of brand artwork, with specialty coatings applied on our Heidelberg 7+1 UV line — delivering soft-touch, high-gloss spot UV, or matte finishes in a single pass. As an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified factory producing 1.7 million boxes daily, we handle both boutique small-batch orders and large-scale jewelry brand runs with equal attention to detail.

item.title: LED-Illuminated Rotating Jewelry Display Stand Box 360° Showcase Remote Control
item.description: Motorized luxury rotating jewelry display box with LED illumination and remote control — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing expertise (founded 2003). A silent DC motor turntable (3 RPM, CE certified) rotates the jewelry piece through 360° while warm-white LED strip lighting (2700K, 95+ CRI) illuminates it from multiple angles — revealing every facet of gemstones and precious metals. The infrared remote control lets users start/stop rotation, dim LEDs, and toggle between continuous rotation and 8-position pause mode. The interior features a flocked or velvet-covered display platform with ring slots, necklace hooks, or a flat display pad. Rigid box construction with magnetic closure wrapped in premium leatherette or art paper with gold foil branding. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across Bincai’s 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory) in Foshan, Guangdong. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 300.

item.title: Luxury Velvet Necklace Display Box with LED Mirror and Gold Foil Embossing
item.description: Luxury velvet necklace display box with integrated LED mirror lid and gold foil embossing by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). This premium display box elevates necklace presentation with a battery-powered LED mirror that illuminates the jewelry upon opening, creating an unforgettable unboxing experience. The flocked velvet interior securely cradles necklaces up to 24 inches, while the rigid greyboard construction and magnetic snap-shut closure ensure lasting protection. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Luxury Watch Gift Set Box — Magnetic Closure — Carbon Fiber Texture — Bincai Rigid Jewelry Packaging
item.description: The luxury watch gift set box with carbon fiber texture is a premium rigid packaging solution designed for high-end timepiece brands. Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this product in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, using KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses. With ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications and a daily output of 1.7 million boxes, Bincai delivers precision-engineered watch packaging at export scale.

item.title: Premium Earring Display Box with LED Base and Acrylic Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

The premium earring display box with built-in LED base and crystal-clear acrylic lid delivers a retail-counter showcase experience inside a gift box. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box integrates a USB-C rechargeable LED module that illuminates earrings from below, with a transparent acrylic lid that lets customers see the product without opening. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Premium Jewelry Bracelet Gift Box with Magnetic Flap and Suede Interior
item.description: Premium jewelry bracelet gift box with magnetic flap closure and suede interior lining by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Designed for luxury bracelet presentation, this box features a soft magnetic flap that opens to reveal a plush suede-lined interior with a custom-shaped groove to cradle bangles and bracelets securely. The magnetic closure provides a satisfying snap-shut action while the rigid greyboard construction ensures crush resistance during shipping and retail handling. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Single-Tier Velvet Ring Display Box with LED Light and Beveled Mirror
item.description: Single-tier velvet ring display box with integrated LED illumination and beveled mirror — designed and manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. for engagement rings, wedding bands, and fine jewelry that deserves the most captivating presentation. The moment the lid opens, a magnetic reed switch activates a warm white 3000K LED panel that bathes the ring in soft, flattering light — transforming the reveal into a theatrical moment. The beveled-edge mirror on the lid underside reflects the illuminated ring from above, creating depth and brilliance that enhances diamond sparkle and gemstone color. The ring sits in a precision-cut velvet cushion with elastic retention that holds the ring securely at the optimal display angle. Exterior wrapped in premium PU leatherette (30+ colors and textures) with optional hot foil stamped logo. Manufactured by 50+ specialist craft workers in our dedicated jewelry box assembly zone, with full electrostatic velvet flocking at 1.5mm pile height. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015, FSC, SGS, and CPSIA certified. 1.7M boxes daily from 18,000 sqm dual-factory.

item.title: Velvet Bracelet Bangle Display Box Magnetic Closure Satin Pillow
item.description: Premium velvet-covered rigid display box designed specifically for bracelets and bangles, featuring magnetic flip-lid closure and a removable satin-covered bangle pillow by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The satin pillow insert holds bangles securely during transport and retail display, while the magnetic closure provides a satisfying, premium unboxing experience. Velvet exterior available in 40+ colors with optional hot foil logo stamping. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Velvet Bracelet Bangle Display Box with N52 Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

The velvet bracelet bangle display box with N52 magnetic closure is designed for premium jewelry brands that demand flawless presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this rigid box features ultra-soft flocked velvet wrap, a precision-cut bangle insert, and an N52 neodymium magnet closure that delivers a satisfying snap. Our 18,000 sqm factory (10,000 sqm + 8,000 sqm smart factory expansion 2025) produces 1.7 million boxes daily on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA/E die-cutters.

item.title: Velvet Double Ring Solitaire Display Box Magnetic Closure Satin Pillow
item.description: Velvet Double Ring Solitaire Display Box with magnetic closure and dual satin pillows by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Designed specifically for engagement ring and wedding band presentation, this double-compartment box features soft satin-ring pillows that cradle each ring securely while the magnetic flip-lid provides a satisfying closure experience. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Velvet Double-Deck Necklace Bracelet Gift Box with Magnetic Closure and Satin Pillows
item.description:
Product Overview

The double-deck velvet necklace and bracelet gift box with magnetic closure is purpose-built for luxury jewelry sets that require dual-level presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box separates necklaces on the upper deck and bracelets or bangles on the lower deck — each with dedicated satin pillows and flocked grooves. The N52 neodymium magnetic closure delivers a satisfying premium snap, while the velvet-wrapped exterior elevates unboxing to a luxury experience. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst SP 102 BMA/E die-cutters, Bobst Visioncut 106 LER laser die-cutter, and Bobst Expertfold 110 A2 folder-gluer.

item.title: Velvet Double-Layer Jewelry Box with LED Vanity Mirror
item.description: Velvet double-layer jewelry box with integrated LED vanity mirror — engineered for premium jewelry presentation by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging manufacturer with 23 years of industry leadership (founded 2003). This dual-tier jewelry box combines luxury aesthetics with functional LED illumination, designed for high-end jewelry retailers, boutique brands, subscription box services, and direct-to-consumer fine jewelry brands. The box features a 2.5mm rigid greyboard structure precision-wrapped in Italian-imported flocked velvet with 14 color options (midnight black, royal sapphire, burgundy red, champagne gold, blush pink, emerald green, ivory white, charcoal grey, navy blue, plum purple, teal, chocolate brown, slate, and pearl white). The removable upper tray contains precision-cut ring rolls (8 slots), earring cards (6 pairs), and a necklace hook area, while the lower tier offers bracelet compartments and removable dividers. The integrated LED ring mirror on the inner lid features touch-dimming technology (3 brightness levels) powered by a replaceable CR2032 battery delivering 200+ hours of illumination. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press (15,000 sheets/hour) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV press (inter-deck UV curing, single-pass CMYK+spot+coating) with Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping (±0.15mm registration). Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000 sqm main + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025) operates fully automatic rigid box production lines delivering 220,000+ boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Velvet Hinged Ring Box with LED Spotlight and Magnetic Closure
item.description: Velvet hinged ring box with automatic LED spotlight and N52 magnetic closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The compact hinged design opens to reveal a die-cut velvet ring slot illuminated by a warm-white LED spotlight that activates automatically when the lid is raised. Built with precision N52 neodymium magnets for a satisfying snap-shut closure. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion) in Foshan, Pearl River Delta.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Display Box with LED Mirror — 4-Compartment Satin Lining — Bincai Rigid Jewelry Packaging
item.description: The velvet necklace display box with LED mirror is a premium rigid jewelry packaging solution designed for high-end necklace brands. Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this product in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex in Foshan, China, using KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses. With ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications and a daily output of 1.7 million boxes, Bincai delivers consistent quality at export scale.

item.title: Velvet Travel Jewelry Roll Organizer with Detachable Ring Bar & Zipper Pouch
item.description:
Product Overview

The Velvet Travel Jewelry Roll Organizer combines portable elegance with complete jewelry protection — a detachable ring bar holds up to 8 rings, 6 elastic earring card slots secure studs and drops, 2 bracelet snap loops prevent tangling, and a removable zippered necklace pouch with anti-tarnish microfiber lining protects fine chains from oxidation. When unfolded, it presents as a luxurious full-length display; when rolled and tied with the elastic ribbon closure, it compresses to a compact 20×15×4cm — ideal for business travel, destination weddings, or retail gift-with-purchase promotions.

item.title: Velvet Watch Collector Box 8-Slot Glass Lid LED Lighting Remote Control
item.description: Velvet watch collector display box with 8 individual watch slots, tempered glass viewing lid, integrated LED lighting, and remote control operation, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The 8-slot layout accommodates a full watch collection with individual suede-lined compartments and removable watch cushions. The tempered glass lid provides dust-free display while the LED strip lighting with remote control offers adjustable brightness and color temperature for optimal presentation. N52 neodymium magnetic closure with lock and key ensures secure storage. Produced across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Custom Luxury Pendant Necklace Gift Box with LED Light & Mirror — Velvet Interior
item.description:
Product Overview

Premium custom pendant necklace gift box with integrated LED spotlight and vanity mirror — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. The hinged lid features a built-in LED module that illuminates the pendant when opened, paired with an acrylic vanity mirror on the underside of the lid for an interactive unboxing experience. The plush velvet-flocked interior cradles the necklace on a satin pillow with a secure clasp groove. Magnetic snap closure ensures elegant presentation. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory).

item.title: Custom Octagonal Velvet Ring Display Box LED Spotlight 360° Rotating Platform Jewelry Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Our octagonal velvet ring display box with LED spotlight and 360° rotating platform represents the pinnacle of jewelry presentation engineering. The hinged octagonal lid opens to activate a warm-white LED spotlight that illuminates the ring from above, while a whisper-quiet motorized platform rotates the ring continuously at 0.5 RPM — ensuring every facet catches the light. The interior is fully flocked in premium black velvet with a precision die-cut ring slot accommodating sizes 4–13. Constructed from 2.0mm rigid greyboard wrapped in matching velvet, the octagonal shape adds architectural sophistication that sets it apart from conventional square boxes. A built-in 2000mAh rechargeable lithium battery with USB-C charging provides 8+ hours of continuous display — ideal for retail counters, exhibition showcases, and proposal moments. Manufactured at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated factory with 23 years of jewelry packaging expertise. Every box undergoes 7-stage QC from LED module testing to rotation smoothness verification.

item.title: Double Ring Box Velvet Interior LED Light Magnetic Closure Wedding Band Set
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s double ring box is engineered for wedding band sets and dual-ring jewelry presentations. The integrated warm-white LED sensor light activates automatically when the lid opens — illuminating both rings against the deep velvet backdrop — and deactivates on closure. This creates an unforgettable unboxing moment that wedding photographers love and couples remember forever. ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified manufacturing. 23 years of jewelry packaging expertise.

item.title: Double-Layer Bracelet & Bangle Display Box with Velvet Groove Insert
item.description:
Product Overview

Professional double-layer bracelet and bangle display box engineered for jewelry retailers, trade show exhibitors, and wholesale distributors. The upper tier features six precision-milled velvet grooves that cradle individual bracelets in separated channels — preventing tangling and scratching during transport and display. A removable lower drawer with eight partitioned compartments stores bangles, cuffs, and expandable bracelets securely. The magnetic flip lid closes with a satisfying snap via N48 neodymium magnets, while the integrated satin ribbon pull tab allows effortless opening. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility — 23 years of dedicated packaging expertise.

item.title: Double-Layer Earring & Necklace Gift Box — Mirror with LED Light, Satin Interior
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this double-layer earring and necklace gift box with integrated LED-lit mirror — a premium packaging solution for jewelry brands selling coordinated sets. The dual-tier design separates earrings in the upper flocked tray from necklaces in the lower satin-lined compartment, preventing tangling during transit. A built-in LED mirror activates on lid opening, letting customers try on jewelry immediately upon unboxing. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, each box undergoes Seven-Stage QC inspection with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification. Daily output capacity of 1.7 million boxes supports volume orders from 300 to 300,000 units.

item.title: Flocked Necklace Presentation Box — Magnetic Flap Closure with Custom Logo Hot Stamping
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years of expertise) presents this elegant flocked necklace presentation box — designed for jewelry brands that demand a tactile, luxury unboxing experience at an accessible price point. Produced in our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, this box features a soft-touch flocked exterior, magnetic flap closure, and a custom-fit velvet necklace insert that holds the piece securely for transit and display.

item.title: Luxury Cufflink & Tie Clip Display Box with Velvet Interior and LED Spotlight
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Luxury Cufflink & Tie Clip Display Box elevates men’s accessory presentation with dual velvet compartments, an integrated LED spotlight that activates on opening, and a magnetic flip closure with gold foil branding. Designed for luxury menswear brands, corporate gifting programs, and high-end jewelry retailers who demand display-ready packaging that sells the product before the customer touches it. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan — 23 years of paper box mastery, KBA 1050 + Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified, delivering 1.7 million boxes daily to 50+ countries.

item.title: Luxury Watch Presentation Box with Carbon Fiber Texture LED Lighting
item.description:
Product Overview

Luxury watch presentation box with carbon fiber textured exterior and automatic LED interior lighting, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years (founded 2003). Our 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm Gaobu smart factory) produces 220,000+ rigid gift boxes daily, with Kolbus DA270 casemakers backed by skilled hand-wrapping teams. Heidelberg Speedmaster XL 7+1 UV press handles inner branding panels, while ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certification ensure quality and sustainability.

item.title: Multi-Layer Velvet Necklace Display Box — Satin-Lined Compartments + Magnetic Closure
item.description: Multi-layer velvet necklace display box with satin-lined compartments and magnetic flap closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. Purpose-built for fine jewelry brands, artisan jewelers, and luxury retailers, this box presents necklaces, pendants, and chains in a layered display format that allows each piece to be viewed independently. The exterior is wrapped in premium flocked velvet with gold or silver hot foil branding, while the interior features satin-lined compartments with die-cut necklace holders. The magnetic flap closure provides a satisfying premium closing experience. Produced across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Pearl Earring & Necklace Set Gift Box with Velvet Tray & Magnetic Flap
item.description:
Product Overview

This dual-compartment pearl jewelry set box is designed for complete pearl jewelry collections — accommodating a pearl necklace in the main channel and matching pearl earrings in two dedicated stud slots. The custom vacuum-formed velvet tray holds each piece securely with die-cut recesses tailored to specific pearl sizes, preventing movement during shipping and providing a premium jewelry-counter presentation. The magnetic flap closure ensures easy one-hand opening for retail display while keeping contents protected during storage. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box uses 2.5mm FSC-certified greyboard and 200gsm art paper wrap. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 1.7 million boxes guarantees consistent quality from sample to production. The box exterior can be fully customized with your brand’s logo in hot foil stamping, embossing, or full-color printing, making it an ideal retail-ready packaging solution for pearl jewelry brands, jewelry store chains, and online luxury accessories retailers.

item.title: Rotating 360° Velvet Jewelry Presentation Box with LED Spotlight Necklace Display
item.description: Rotating 360° velvet jewelry presentation box with LED spotlight for premium necklace display by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). A motorized rotating platform with warm LED spotlight creates a mesmerizing showcase for premium necklaces, pendants, and fine jewelry. Black velvet-lined interior with magnetic flip-lid and built-in mirror. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory, 2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC® certified.

item.title: Two-Tier Velvet Jewelry Display Box with Lock and Key — Premium Jewelry Packaging
item.description:
Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) presents the ultimate jewelry presentation solution — a two-tier velvet jewelry display box with solid brass lock and key closure. This premium rigid box features a lift-out upper tray revealing a second deep storage tier beneath, providing organized display for rings, necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and watches in a single elegant case.

Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm dual-factory in Foshan, Guangdong, the box combines the precision of KBA Rapida 105 offset printing, Heidelberg 7+1 UV foil accents, and CNC-milled EVA foam inserts (±0.5mm) for perfectly fitted jewelry cavities. The electrostatic velvet flocking (1.0mm pile density) in black, navy, cream, or burgundy provides a luxurious backdrop that makes jewelry pieces appear to float. An optional CR2032-powered LED module (50,000-hour rated) with reed-switch activation illuminates the jewelry automatically when the lid is opened — creating an unforgettable unboxing experience at retail counters or for e-commerce unboxing videos.

item.title: Velvet Bangle Display Box — Magnetic Closure with LED Spotlight & Satin Groove Insert
item.description: The velvet bangle display box transforms bangle presentation from simple storage into a retail-ready showcase. Engineered by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Foshan-based paper box manufacturer with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise — this compact display box combines a magnetic flip-lid with a concealed LED spotlight that activates on opening, casting a warm glow across the bangle resting in a precision-cut satin groove insert.

item.title: Velvet Double-Layer Ring & Earring Display Jewelry Box — LED Mirror + Magnetic Closure
item.description: Velvet double-layer ring and earring display jewelry box with built-in LED mirror and magnetic closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. This elegant two-tier jewelry box features a mirror lid embedded with a warm-white LED strip that illuminates when opened, creating a boutique retail experience. The upper tray holds rings in plush velvet grooves while the removable lower layer stores earring pairs, small pendants, and other fine jewelry. Premium velvet flocking lines every surface, with a satisfying magnetic closure and gold foil logo on the exterior. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Velvet Earbud Wireless Headphone Display Box Magnetic Closure Custom Logo
item.description: Velvet earbud wireless headphone display box with magnetic flap closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). The rigid construction with velvet-wrapped interior provides premium presentation for wireless earbuds, headphones, and tech accessories. Custom logo embossing and gold foil stamping deliver a luxury unboxing experience that elevates your brand. KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver precision printing across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Velvet Hinged Ring Display Box with LED Light Jewelry Retail
item.description: Velvet hinged ring display box with automatic LED illumination for jewelry retail stores by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The integrated LED module activates when the lid opens, casting a focused warm light onto the ring for maximum visual impact at point of sale. The plush velvet interior cradles the ring securely while preventing scratches and tarnish. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory) (2025 expansion). Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and Dual-Layer Drawer
item.description: The Velvet Jewelry Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and Dual-Layer Drawer represents the pinnacle of jewelry packaging engineering. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in their 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this box transforms the unboxing moment into a theatrical experience: a magnetic reed switch triggers an automatic LED spotlight the instant the lid opens, illuminating the jewelry against a luxurious satin backdrop. The dual-layer sliding drawer — a Bincai signature design — provides a hidden lower compartment for certificates, care guides, or additional pieces without compromising the clean top-level presentation.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Roll Travel Organizer — 6-Compartment Zipper Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s velvet jewelry roll travel organizer brings the elegance of a boutique display case into a portable format. Six individually designed compartments — elastic band loops for necklaces, a removable ring bar, zippered mesh pocket for earrings, bracelet snap strap, brooch panel, and watch cushion slot — keep every piece tangle-free and protected. The exterior is wrapped in premium velvet over 2mm rigid paperboard with a suede tie closure and full YKK zipper. Manufactured on Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Velvet Men's Cufflink Tie Clip Set Box Dual Compartment Magnetic Closure
item.description: Dual-compartment velvet men’s cufflink and tie clip set box with magnetic closure — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for men’s accessories including cufflinks, tie clips, lapel pins, collar stays, and pocket squares, this premium display box offers separate velvet-lined compartments that keep each piece organized and protected. Custom logo embossing and gold foil stamping make it ideal for luxury retail, corporate gifting, and groomsman gift sets. KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver precision printing across 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory). Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Velvet Multi-Row Watch Display Box 10-Slot with Glass Lid Push-Button Hardware
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Velvet Multi-Row Watch Display Box with 10 slots delivers museum-grade presentation for fine watch retailers and discerning collectors. Each box features a 3mm tempered glass viewing lid, deep plush velvet flocking throughout, removable watch pillows, and precision antique brass push-button latch hardware. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan, Guangdong, Bincai leverages 23 years of paper box expertise and ISO 9001:2015 quality systems to produce over 1.7 million color boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes daily across KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press lines.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with Transparent Window Lid
item.description:
Product Overview

Elegant velvet necklace pendant display box featuring a crystal-clear PET transparent lid that allows full product visibility without opening — ideal for retail shelf display and e-commerce photography. The interior is precision-flocked with electrostatic black velvet and includes two necklace hooks (with silicone retention caps) plus a recessed foam cushion for pendants up to 50mm diameter. The magnetic snap closure keeps the box securely shut during transport while providing an effortless open-close experience. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) — 23 years elevating jewelry packaging across our 18,000 sqm integrated facility.

item.title: Velvet Ring Presentation Box — LED Spotlight with Certificate of Authenticity Drawer & Satin Pillow
item.description: The velvet ring presentation box with LED spotlight and certificate drawer is designed for the most significant jewelry moment — the reveal. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan paper box specialist with 18,000 sqm across two facilities — this box wraps 1.5mm rigid greyboard in premium velvet with a magnetic closure that opens with satisfying precision. A warm white LED spotlight automatically illuminates the ring as the lid opens, while the concealed pull-out drawer elegantly presents the certificate of authenticity, diamond grading report, or brand story.

item.title: Velvet Solitaire Ring Display Box with Magnetic Closure & LED Mirror
item.description:
Product Overview

This velvet solitaire ring display box is purpose-built for jewelry retailers and engagement ring presentations. The lid-integrated LED spotlight activates automatically upon opening, illuminating the ring from above while the built-in mirror reflects light from below — creating a dramatic jewelry showcase effect. The single ring sits in a precision die-cut groove lined with premium satin, ensuring the ring stays perfectly centered and protected during transport. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium packaging since 2003 — each box combines 2.5mm greyboard structural integrity with soft-touch velvet flocking on the exterior for an unmistakable luxury hand feel. Our 18,000 sqm facility with daily output of 1.7 million boxes ensures consistent quality at any order volume. The magnetic N35 neodymium closure provides a satisfying snap when closing and reliable security when the box is stored or stacked. Ideal for engagement rings, wedding bands, anniversary rings, and luxury ring retail displays.

item.title: Velvet Three-Tier Jewelry Trainer Display Box — LED Mirror, Lock & Key, Travel Case
item.description: The Velvet Three-Tier Jewelry Trainer Display Box is a comprehensive jewelry presentation and storage solution designed for professionals who need to showcase, transport, and secure valuable collections. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years experience) at our 18,000 sqm dual-factory facility in Foshan, this display case combines the elegance of a luxury consumer jewelry box with the functionality of a professional trade-show trainer. Produced on our KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with 220,000+ rigid boxes daily output, we deliver consistent quality at any volume.

item.title: 2-Tier Drawer-Slide Velvet Jewelry Display Box with Lock and Key
item.description:
Product Overview

The two-tier drawer-slide velvet jewelry display box represents the pinnacle of luxury jewelry presentation — an heirloom-quality storage solution engineered for fine jewelry brands, luxury retailers, and discerning consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier, founded 2003), this box combines old-world jewelry-box charm with modern precision manufacturing.

The upper tier features a hinged lift-up lid revealing a fully flocked interior with ring roll channels (accommodating 4–12 rings), earring stud strips, necklace hooks, and a velvet-lined pendant well. The lower drawer operates on precision ball-bearing slides — tested to 5,000+ open/close cycles with ≤2N consistent pull force — and reveals compartmented channels for bracelets, bangles, and larger pieces. An antique brass lock and key mechanism (100% pairing verified) provides both security and classic jewelry-box aesthetics, with hardware finish options including polished chrome, rose gold, and matte black.

item.title: 360° Rotating Velvet Ring Display Box with LED Spotlight — Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s 360° rotating velvet ring display box brings kinetic presentation to fine jewelry showcasing. A motorized rotating platform delivers a full 360° product reveal under 3-point LED spotlight illumination — ideal for retail counters, trade show exhibits, and premium unboxing experiences. Push-button activation with auto-off after 60 seconds. Manufactured with KBA 1050 4-color offset printing and precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Double-Layer Slide-Out Velvet Necklace Display Box with Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

The double-layer slide-out velvet necklace display box features an innovative dual-tray design: a top compartment for pendant display with die-cut flocked insert, and a pull-out lower drawer for chain storage — both lined in premium satin. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in 180gsm velvet flocking delivers luxury tactility, while the hidden magnetic side closure keeps both trays securely in place. Ideal for jewelry retailers, e-commerce brands, and bridal gifting where necklace presentation matters.

item.title: Double-Layer Velvet Jewelry Box with Magnetic Flap Ring Earring Display
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — founded 2003 in Foshan’s Shunde district with 23 years of packaging manufacturing heritage — presents this premium double-layer velvet jewelry box with magnetic flap closure, purpose-engineered for jewelry brands and retailers seeking elegant, organized display for ring and earring collections. The double-layer architecture features a removable upper tray with precision Bobst die-cut ring slots (configurable 8–24 positions) and vertical earring card holders, plus a spacious lower compartment for necklaces, bracelets, certificates, and care cards. Black premium electrostatic flocked velvet interior (1.2mm nylon pile height with anti-shed treatment) cradles each piece in non-abrasive luxury. The N42 neodymium magnetic flap provides a satisfying, silent closure with invisible magnet integration — no visible hardware disrupts the clean exterior aesthetic. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press with fingerprint-resistant soft-touch matte lamination at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility (10,000+8,000 smart factory expansion completed 2025). Daily output of 220,000+ luxury gift boxes under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification.

item.title: Hexagonal Velvet Earring Box with Transparent Window and Satin Lining
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s hexagonal velvet earring box reimagines jewelry packaging with its distinctive six-sided geometry and integrated transparent PET window — allowing customers to see the earrings without opening the box. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in 180gsm velvet flocking provides a luxurious hand feel, while the die-cut foam insert holds earrings securely in dedicated slots. Satin-lined interior and magnetic front-flap closure complete the premium unboxing experience. Perfect for retail display, e-commerce shipping, and bridal party gifting.

item.title: LED-Lit Velvet Jewelry Display Box with 360° Rotating Platform for Retail
item.description: Premium LED-lit velvet jewelry display box with 360° motorized rotating platform — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). Integrated warm-white LED strip lighting (2835 SMD, 2700K-3000K) illuminates jewelry from all angles while the silent DC motor platform rotates at 1-3 RPM — the combination creates a mesmerizing retail display that stops customers in their tracks. Built on 1600-2000gsm greyboard wrapped in premium velvet paper available in 20+ colors (black, navy, burgundy, emerald, blush pink, ivory). The platform features a velvet-flocked surface with ring slots, necklace hooks, and a flat display area for bracelets and watches. Powered by rechargeable lithium battery (8+ hours continuous) or USB-C for permanent countertop display. Produced on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color presses across 18,000 sqm factory. CE, RoHS, and CPSIA certified.

item.title: Luxury Brooch Pin Display Box with Velvet Lining & Satin Pillow — Magnetic Flap
item.description:
Elegant brooch and lapel pin display box with plush velvet-lined interior and removable satin pillow insert, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com. Magnetic flap closure, custom hot-foil logo on the lid, and a satin-covered foam pillow that secures the brooch with a precision pin slot. Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction ensures long-term protection for collectible and vintage pieces.

Features

  • Rigid 2.0mm greyboard construction with 157gsm art paper wrap and matte lamination
  • Plush velvet flocking interior — available in black, navy, burgundy, ivory, or custom Pantone
  • Removable satin-covered foam pillow insert with precision pin slot for brooch security
  • Magnetic flap closure — opens flat for full brooch visibility, closes securely
  • Custom logo hot foil stamping on lid — gold, silver, rose gold, or copper
  • Optional debossing or blind embossing for understated luxury branding
  • KBA 1050 4-color offset + Heidelberg 7+1 UV for spot coatings and varnish
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management, FSC certified sustainable materials
  • 23 years experience, 18,000 sqm factory, daily output 1.7 million boxes

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Antique & Vintage Jewelry Display and storage for collectible brooches, cameos, and lapel pins Satin pillow secures delicate pin mechanisms without stress or bending
Luxury Fashion Brands Branded brooch packaging for designer fashion houses Custom embossed logo + premium velvet interior reflects brand prestige
Corporate Recognition Employee service pins, achievement brooches, and lapel pin awards Elegant presentation elevates the perceived value of recognition awards
E-Commerce Jewelry Sellers Protective packaging for online brooch and pin sales Rigid box construction + velvet interior prevents transit damage
Museum & Gallery Shops Reproduction brooch and cameo pin packaging Archival-quality materials — acid-free options available for long-term preservation
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM brooch box manufacturing for global jewelry distributors MOQ 500, full customization, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Pillow Style Single satin pillow (standard), double pillow for brooch sets, or custom die-cut multi-cavity insert
Pillow Fabric Satin (standard), velvet, suede, linen, or faux leather
Pin Slot Type Single horizontal slot, vertical slot, T-bar slot, or custom-cut to your brooch clasp design
Exterior Material 157gsm art paper (matte/gloss), 120gsm textured paper, 200gsm specialty board, or PU leather wrap
Exterior Color Any Pantone — classic black, navy, burgundy, cream, or custom
Logo Application Hot foil stamping, blind embossing, debossing, UV spot, full-color offset printing, or screen printing
Closure Magnetic flap (standard), ribbon tie, or elastic band
Additional Features Document/certificate pocket inside lid, printed insert card, ribbon pull tab, custom-printed tissue
Custom Sizes 100×80×35mm (small brooch) to 200×150×50mm (large statement brooch)
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom pillow design or specialty exterior materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1200-1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.0mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for flap hinge and magnetic alignment
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — hot-melt adhesive, zero-bubble finish on 157gsm art paper
Velvet Flocking Electrostatic flocking — 0.5-0.8mm nylon/polyester fibers, adhesion ≥5N/25mm
Satin Pillow Die-cut foam core + satin wrap — RF-welded edges, no visible glue lines; pin slot reinforced with bar-tack stitching
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø8mm×2mm — press-fit into greyboard cavities, pull force ≥4N
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil press — KURZ foil, 120-140°C, gold/silver/metallic on art paper
Flap Hinge Scored greyboard + wrap — tested to 5,000 open/close cycles without board fatigue
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — wrap folded over board, no raw edges exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board lot, flocking batch, magnet supplier, pillow fabric lot

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.0mm ±0.15mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Flocking adhesion Tape pull test — 3M 810 tape ≥5N/25mm, no fiber pull-out
Pillow pin slot strength Pin insertion/extraction — 50 cycles No fabric fraying, foam compression ≤10%
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular ≥4N per magnet pair
Flap alignment Visual + gauge — closed box Gap ≤1mm, flush edges
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil No peeling, clean edges
Flap hinge durability Open/close cycle — 500 cycles No board cracking, no wrap delamination at hinge
Color consistency Spectrophotometer — D50 ΔE ≤2.0 versus approved swatch
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No scratches, glue marks, or wrapping defects

FAQ

Q: Can the satin pillow accommodate different types of brooch pin backs — standard safety catch, trombone clasp, or double-pin?

Features

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Capacity 2-pair, 4-pair, 6-pair, or 8-pair — tray cavities custom die-cut to your cufflink dimensions

Exterior Color Any Pantone — black, navy, burgundy, forest green, ivory, or custom

Closure Magnetic snap (standard), ribbon tie, or elastic band
Additional Features Satin ribbon hinge, certificate/document pocket inside lid, custom-printed tissue paper insert
Custom Sizes 120×90×35mm (2-pair) to 260×180×40mm (8-pair) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 500 units (standard configurations), 1000+ (custom tray or specialty materials)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Greyboard 1200-1600gsm rigid greyboard — 2.0mm caliper, density 0.65-0.75 g/cm³
Board Cutting Bobst automatic die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for tray cavities and magnetic closure alignment
Wrap Application Automatic wrapping machine — 157gsm art paper with hot-melt adhesive, zero-bubble finish
Velvet Flocking Electrostatic flocking — 0.5-0.8mm fiber length, nylon/polyester blend, adhesion ≥5N/25mm
Suede Tray Die-cut greyboard + suede lamination — RF-welded cavity edges, no visible glue lines
Magnet Insertion Neodymium disc magnets Ø8mm×2mm — press-fit into greyboard, pull force ≥4N per magnet
Embossing Copper die embossing on Heidelberg cylinder press — 0.5-1.5mm relief depth, hot or cold process
Foil Stamping Heidelberg hot foil stamping — 120-140°C, gold/silver/metallic foil on KURZ foil feed
Edge Finishing Turned-edge construction — 157gsm wrap folded over greyboard edge, no raw board exposed
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board lot, flocking batch, magnet supplier, QC sign-off per batch

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board caliper Digital micrometer — 5 points per sheet 2.0mm ±0.15mm
Wrap adhesion Cross-hatch tape test No delamination, ≤5% removal
Flocking adhesion Tape pull test — 3M 810 tape ≥5N/25mm, no fiber pull-out
Tray cavity fit Test insert with standard cufflink Snug fit, no lateral movement ≥0.5mm
Magnet pull force Force gauge — perpendicular pull ≥4N per magnet pair
Magnetic alignment Test close — 100 cycles Consistent alignment, no scratching of wrap
Embossing depth Depth gauge As specified ±0.2mm
Foil adhesion Tape test on foil No peeling or lifting

item.title: Velvet Earring Card Display Box with Easel Stand Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

A dual-purpose earring packaging solution that functions as both a protective gift box and a retail countertop display. The built-in easel stand back props the open box at a 65° angle, transforming it into a self-standing showcase. Inside, 12 die-cut slots hold earring cards securely, while the magnetic snap closure keeps everything protected during transport. Gold foil hot-stamped logo on the lid exterior and a satin ribbon pull tab complete the premium presentation. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of packaging manufacturing expertise.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Gift Box Set — 3-Layer Drawer for Ring, Bracelet & Necklace Collection
item.description:
Product Overview

Luxury 3-layer velvet jewelry gift box set designed to showcase an entire jewelry collection — rings, bracelets, and necklaces — in a single elegant presentation. Three pull-out drawers with precision velvet flocking and die-cut insert slots organize each jewelry type. The magnetic flap closure with gold foil logo branding creates a boutique unboxing experience. Optional LED-lit vanity mirror in the top lid adds retail display functionality. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Gift Box with Hidden Message Compartment and Magnetic Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

Some gifts speak without words. The Velvet Jewelry Gift Box with Hidden Message Compartment is engineered for those moments — a beautifully crafted jewelry box that holds more than a ring, necklace, or bracelet. It holds a secret. A concealed drawer beneath the main jewelry tray slides open to reveal an engraved message: a proposal, an anniversary note, a brand story, or a personalized thank-you.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Multi-Strand Display Box Magnetic Closure Gold Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

A premium multi-strand necklace display box engineered for jewelry retailers and luxury brands. Features three independent necklace hooks suspended behind a soft velvet backboard, each capable of holding a full 18–24 inch strand without tangling. The magnetic flip-lid closure opens to a 120° angle for retail countertop presentation, while the gold foil hot-stamped logo and border elevate brand perception. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. with precision die-cutting and manual velvet flocking for a flawless interior finish.

item.title: Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with LED Light Custom Logo Jewelry Packaging
item.description:
Velvet Necklace Pendant Display Box with LED Light — Luxury Jewelry Packaging

Elevate your jewelry presentation with Bincai’s velvet necklace pendant display box featuring an integrated LED spotlight system. Each box combines premium materials, precision manufacturing, and thoughtful design to create an unforgettable unboxing experience.

Key Features

  • Integrated LED Spotlight: Battery-powered warm white LED illuminates the pendant when the lid opens, drawing attention to the jewelry piece. Auto-off magnetic sensor conserves battery.
  • Premium Velvet Flocking: Soft, non-abrasive velvet lining in black, navy, burgundy, or custom colors protects delicate chain and pendant surfaces from scratches.
  • Satin Interior Pillow: Removable satin-covered insert secures the necklace pendant at the display angle while the chain tucks neatly into a rear compartment.
  • Custom Gold Foil Stamping: Your brand logo, monogram, or pattern embossed in gold, silver, rose gold, or holographic foil on the exterior lid.
  • Magnetic Flip Lid: Strong neodymium magnets ensure a satisfying snap-close feel and prevent accidental opening during transport.

Applications

This display box is designed for:

item.title: Velvet Ring Presentation Box with LED Spotlight and 360° Rotating Platform
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s velvet ring presentation box with LED spotlight and 360° rotating platform transforms the moment of reveal into a theatrical experience. The 2mm rigid greyboard construction wrapped in premium velvet flocking provides luxurious tactility, while the magnetic front-flap opens to activate three warm-white LEDs that illuminate the ring from optimal angles. The motorized rotating platform (1 RPM) slowly turns the ring for a complete view — powered by a whisper-quiet Mabuchi micro motor with 50+ hours of battery life. Ideal for engagement proposals, luxury jewelry retail, and high-end ring presentations.

item.title: Dual-Layer Magnetic Jewelry Ring Box
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Dual-Layer Magnetic Jewelry Ring Box offers versatile presentation with two compartments — a top velvet ring slot for the hero piece and a lower drawer for accessories. The magnetic closure secures both layers simultaneously. Built on 2.0mm greyboard with flocked velvet lining, this box combines functionality with luxury aesthetics.

Features

  • Dual-Layer Design: Top ring cushion (velvet-wrapped foam insert) + pull-out bottom drawer for earrings, chain, or certificate
  • Magnetic Closure: Dual magnet pairs secure both layers with satisfying snap-lock
  • Ring Cushion: 40×15mm velvet-wrapped foam with slit; accommodates ring sizes 4-12
  • Bottom Drawer: 20mm deep with satin lining, perfect for accompanying items
  • Custom Sizes: Standard 80×80×55mm, customizable 60×60×40mm to 150×120×70mm
  • Foil & Finish: Gold/silver/rose gold hot stamping, matte or gloss lamination, spot UV

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Press: Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color offset — Pantone spot color accuracy, ±0.15mm print registration
  • Board: 2.0mm rigid greyboard core wrapped in 157gsm art paper
  • Interior: 1.5mm black velvet flocking throughout; 40×15mm velvet-wrapped EVA ring cushion
  • Magnetic Closure: Dual N35 neodymium magnet pairs, concealed beneath wrap; tested 5,000+ open/close cycles
  • Drawer Mechanism: Precision die-cut slide rails with 20mm-deep satin-lined cavity
  • Daily Output: 220,000+ gift boxes + 1.7M color boxes
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management, FSC Chain-of-Custody

Lid Alignment Internal ≤0.8mm gap tolerance

Feature Detail

item.title: Earring Card Paper Box with Clear PVC Window Custom Logo Retail

item.title: Jewelry Box for Necklace & Pendant — Velvet Interior Display Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s premium necklace and pendant jewelry box is purpose-built for jewelry retailers, e-commerce brands, and boutique artisans who demand retail-ready presentation at wholesale economics. The hinged lid opens to a full 180° display angle — the box transforms from protective packaging into a countertop showcase in one motion. A plush velvet interior (2mm flocking, 0.8mm pile) cradles the necklace chain in anti-tangle channels, while the removable satin display cushion elevates the pendant for maximum visual impact.

item.title: Jewelry Ring Display Box LED Spotlight Velvet Flocking Interior
item.description: Captivating jewelry ring display box with integrated LED spotlight and luxurious velvet flocking interior — designed to make every ring sparkle at first sight. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory runs KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with Bobst foil stamping and automatic rigid box production lines, producing 220,000+ rigid gift boxes daily alongside 1.7 million color boxes. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. The warm LED spotlight activates automatically upon opening via a magnetic reed switch, illuminating the ring from an optimal 45° angle for maximum diamond brilliance and gemstone fire. Every LED module undergoes 100% illumination testing and 10,000-cycle switch endurance verification.

item.title: Luxury Leather Hinged Gift Box for Watches and Jewelry
item.description:
Product Overview

The Luxury Leather Hinged Gift Box combines the timeless elegance of fine leather craftsmanship with Guangdong Bincai’s precision manufacturing capabilities. Each box is built on a rigid greyboard core (1000–1400gsm, 1.5–2.5mm thickness) wrapped in premium PU leatherette or genuine Nappa leather in your choice of matte, pebbled, or croc-embossed textures. The hinged construction — available as a piano-style zinc alloy hinge or a continuous leatherette hinge — is rated for 10,000+ open/close cycles, ensuring years of daily use for watch collectors, jewelry retailers, and luxury brands.

item.title: Luxury Necklace Gift Box Magnetic Flap Velvet Lining Gold Foil Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Luxury Necklace Gift Box combines a magnetic flap closure with sumptuous velvet flocking to create an elegant showcase for fine necklaces, pendants, and chains. The rigid greyboard construction with 157gsm art paper wrap provides substantial heft and protection, while the gold foil logo stamping on the lid communicates premium brand identity at first glance. Each box integrates N42-grade neodymium magnets for a satisfying, secure snap closure and features a custom necklace clasp hook system to keep jewelry perfectly positioned. Produced at our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory equipped with KBA 1050 4-color offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, each box undergoes 15 quality control checkpoints. With 23 years of manufacturing heritage, Bincai serves over 500 global jewelry and luxury brands with daily output of 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Luxury Suede Jewelry Presentation Box with Magnetic Double-Door and LED Lighting
item.description:

The dual magnetic doors swing open symmetrically, revealing a mirrored lid interior that reflects the jewelry from multiple angles while the integrated LED spotlight (warm white 3000K, auto-activating on door open) illuminates the piece with gallery-quality lighting. The entire interior is lined in premium synthetic suede (or genuine suede leather upgrade) with velvet-flocked side walls in a contrasting tone, creating depth and luxury that photographs beautifully for e-commerce listing images. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of expertise — every double-door box passes rigorous testing including LED cycle life verification (10,000+ activations), magnet force consistency, and suede colorfastness. Our dual-factory setup delivers 220,000+ gift boxes daily on Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 press lines.

The leather-look PU exterior with contrast stitching delivers the visual impact of genuine leather at a fraction of the cost, while the magnetic closure ensures all three tiers stay securely aligned. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of packaging expertise — each set box undergoes rigorous tier-alignment QC, hinge cycle testing, and velvet adhesion verification. Our dual-factory Foshan operation produces 1.7 million+ boxes daily.

item.title: Two-Tone Velvet Bracelet Gift Box with Magnetic Closure — Custom Logo Embossing
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s two-tone velvet bracelet gift box elevates jewelry presentation with contrasting interior velvet colors and a plush satin display pillow. The magnetic flap closure opens flat to a 180° display angle, revealing the bracelet on a sculpted cushion. Manufactured with KBA 1050 4-color offset printing and precision die-cutting in our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory. 23 years of luxury packaging expertise.

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Press: KBA 1050 4-color offset — precise registration for branded patterns
  • Board: 1.5mm greyboard core, 157gsm art paper wrap
  • Interior: Dual-color 2mm velvet flocking — base color + contrast pillow tray
  • Cushion: Satin-covered foam bracelet form, 3 standard profiles (round, oval, rectangular)
  • Closure: Magnetic flap with concealed neodymium magnet
  • Finishing: Gold foil hot stamping + blind embossing on exterior lid
  • Daily Output: 220,000+ gift boxes (post-2025 smart factory expansion)
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 80×80×40mm to 200×150×60mm
Exterior Material 157gsm/250gsm art paper, textured paper, leatherette, linen
Print Method CMYK offset, Pantone spot, hot foil stamping, embossing, debossing
Foil Colors Gold, silver, rose gold, holographic, copper
Velvet Colors 20+ colors — mix any two for interior contrast
Cushion Style Single bracelet form, double bracelet, bracelet + charm slot
MOQ 500 units (standard cushion), 1,000+ (custom cushion tooling)

Industry Applications

Jewelry Type Box Configuration Key Feature
Bracelet / Bangle Formed bracelet pillow Two-tone contrast presentation
Cuff / Wide Bracelet Flat velvet bed + strap Adjustable securing band
Charm Bracelet Compartmented insert Separate charm display slots
Anklet Slim-profile box Compact retail footprint

Production Quality

Test Method / Standard Acceptance Criteria
Lid Alignment Digital caliper, 100% inline Gap ≤1.0mm
Velvet Bond Cross-hatch tape test (ISO 2409) ≥2.5 N/cm² peel strength
Magnetic Hold Force gauge, 100% test Closure force ≥3.0N
Print Registration Heidelberg Prinect inline ±0.15mm color-to-color
Color Consistency X-Rite eXact — ΔE vs. master ΔE ≤2.0
Velvet Colorfastness Rub test, 500 cycles No visible transfer
Drop Test ISTA 1A — 10 drops from 760mm No structural failure or magnet release
Foil Adhesion Tape pull test, 3M 810 No lifting or peeling
AQL Sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (critical)

7-Stage QC Gate

  1. Incoming Material Inspection — greyboard density, velvet pile height, magnet grade N35, satin fabric GSM
  2. In-Process Printing — spectrophotometer color check every 500 sheets on Heidelberg/KBA press
  3. Die-Cutting & Creasing — ±0.15mm tolerance, 100% panel alignment verification
  4. Velvet Flocking Application — electrostatic fiber deposition, pile uniformity, dual-color registration check under D65
  5. Assembly & Cushion QC — magnet recess depth, hinge range of motion, pillow form fit, elastic retention band tension
  6. Finished Goods Audit — AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.5 (critical) per ANSI/ASQ Z1.4
  7. Pre-Shipment Inspection — random sample pull, full functional test, cosmetic review under D65 lighting

Why Choose Bincai

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing specializes in luxury jewelry packaging with 23 years of rigid box manufacturing expertise. Our dual-tone velvet bracelet boxes benefit from vertical integration — electrostatic velvet flocking, precision die-cutting, and foil stamping all happen under one roof in our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified factory. With KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, we deliver consistent print quality at 1.7M boxes daily. Every bracelet box undergoes 7-stage QC from material inspection through pre-shipment audit, ensuring luxury brand standards for retail and e-commerce.

item.title: Velvet Jewelry Travel Case with Zipper Closure Necklace Ring Set
item.description:
Product Overview

Designed with a full-wrap YKK zipper closure, elastic retention straps, and a padded center divider, this compact case organizes necklaces, rings, earrings, and bracelets in one portable package.

Manufacturing Excellence

Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified factory with 23 years of expertise since 2003 — each travel case undergoes 12-point QC inspection including zipper cycle testing (2,000+ open/close), velvet abrasion resistance (Martindale 50,000+ rubs), and compartment fitment verification. Custom logos are hot-stamped using the Bobst SP 102 BMA foil stamping press with ±0.15mm registration accuracy, while printed art paper wraps are produced on the KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press at 15,000 sheets/hour or the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV with inter-deck UV curing for instant-dry special finishes.

item.title: Velvet Lined Jewelry Pendant Box with LED
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Velvet Lined Jewelry Pendant Box with LED transforms jewelry presentation with integrated illumination. A warm LED activates when the box opens, highlighting the pendant against the velvet backdrop. Manufactured in our Shunde facility with 2.0mm rigid greyboard construction and German-engineered precision printing.

Applications

Industry Product Type Typical Use
Fine Jewelry Pendant necklaces, medallions Premium retail display, e-commerce unboxing
Luxury Accessories Brooches, pins, cufflinks Branded gift packaging for boutiques
Bridal Wedding jewelry sets Bridesmaid gifts, bridal suite presentation
Watch & Timepiece Small watches, pocket watches Illuminated display for collector pieces
Corporate Gifting Service awards, milestone gifts Embossed logo, LED reveal for executive gifting
Museum & Gallery Replica jewelry, artifacts Museum gift shop illuminated display boxes
Direct Sales Home-party jewelry brands Compact, lighted presentation for in-home demos
E-Commerce Subscription box inserts Premium branded unboxing with LED wow factor

Features

  • Built-In LED: Warm white LED (2700K) with magnetic reed switch — activates on open, deactivates on close. Battery-powered (CR2032, replaceable), rated 50+ hours continuous
  • Velvet Interior: 1.5mm black flocked velvet with die-cut pendant cavity and chain channel
  • Display Window: Clear PVC or PET window option for retail shelf visibility
  • Magnetic Closure: Hidden neodymium magnets in lid and base for clean snap-lock
  • Custom Sizes: Standard 120×80×40mm, customizable to fit pendants, brooches, and cufflinks
  • Finishing: Matte lamination, gold/silver foil stamping, embossing available

Manufacturing Specifications

  • Press: Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA 1050 4-color — rich solids on dark velvet wraps, ±0.15mm precision
  • Board: 2.0mm rigid greyboard core (1200–1600gsm) wrapped in 157gsm art paper
  • LED System: Warm white 2700K LED, magnetic reed switch activation, CR2032 battery (replaceable), 50+ hour continuous runtime
  • Interior: 1.5mm black flocked velvet with die-cut pendant cavity and chain channel (2.5mm depth)
  • Window: Clear PVC or PET display window, ultrasonically welded for dust-proof seal
  • Magnetic Closure: Hidden N35 neodymium magnets in lid and base, 5,000-cycle durability
  • Daily Output: 220,000+ gift boxes + 1.7M color boxes
  • Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody; LED components CE/RoHS compliant

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Size Range 80×60×30mm to 200×150×50mm
Wrap Material 157gsm/250gsm art paper, soft-touch, leatherette, linen-textured
Velvet Color Black, navy, charcoal, burgundy, cream, white
LED Color Warm white 2700K, cool white 6000K, RGB (upgrade)
Window Style Clear PVC, tinted PET, frosted, no window
Foil Colors Gold, silver, rose gold, copper, holographic
Finish Matte lamination, gloss lamination, soft-touch, spot UV
Interior Layout Single pendant, pendant + chain channel, dual pendant, brooch/pin
MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom LED/electronics)

Production Quality

Test Standard Specification
LED Activation Internal 100% QC — reed switch triggers within 15° lid angle
Battery Life Internal ≥50 hrs continuous, leak-test per batch
Window Clarity ASTM D1003 Haze ≤3%, transmittance ≥88%
Lid Alignment Internal ≤0.8mm gap tolerance
Drop Test ISTA 1A 10-drop sequence, 760mm
Print Registration Internal ±0.15mm

Why This Jewelry Box

Most jewelry boxes are passive containers — they hold your product but do nothing to enhance the presentation moment. The Bincai LED Pendant Box is engineered as an active selling tool that creates an emotional reveal every time the lid opens.
